{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201636203F6930D4235119DBA88D\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353304548755178267","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的内容很精彩啊！作者东篱子通过讲述历史上的人物和事件，让我们看到了帝王的操纵智慧和人臣的布局智慧。而且书中的历史故事通俗易懂，还能让我们从中汲取成功的经验和失败的教训，真的很值得一读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709434694,"group_id":"7221801426828135428","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zMUGw7KNZ0jnQ8m628qzA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"556825790912252","user_name":"帝王城的王老夫人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"556825790912252","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221801426828135428","book_info":{"abstract":"本书是帝王操纵智慧。所谓操纵，也就是要牢牢掌握对全局的控制力。帝王至高无上的特殊的地位决定了其生存方式、处世技巧和领导思想的独特性，这种独特性概以一个驭字一一使天下英才为我所用，尽天下之力为我效命，这种封建政治中帝王对臣下、对全局的*统治地位，赋予了其人生智慧纵横发挥的空间只要把对全局的控制力牢牢掌握在手中，其他一切都好办。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8b67e4acbea9da218f3bf54e4f06ee20~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东篱子","author_id":"","book_id":"7221801426828135428","book_name":"历史上的这些事儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c89050","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"762人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":241,\"name\":\"历史文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241\u0026name=历史文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221807054581664823","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"180155"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"11","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8b67e4acbea9da218f3bf54e4f06ee20~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779179780\u0026x-signature=6vTLZ7RA%2FxtA79iAa7MyciNxTSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201636203F6930D4235119DBA88D\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16260,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7221801426828135428","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603201636203F6930D4235119DBA88D","message":"请求成功"}
